mapper.select: SELECT ts.id AS relationId, ts.student_id AS stuId, ts.teacher_id AS teacherId, ts.type, s.student_no AS studentNo, s.user_id AS userId, up.name AS studentName, up.gender, c.college_name AS collegeName, m.major_name AS majorName, cl.class_name AS className, cl.grade FROM teacher_student ts JOIN student s ON ts.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user_profile up ON s.user_id = up.user_id LEFT JOIN college c ON s.college_id = c.id LEFT JOIN major m ON s.major_id = m.id LEFT JOIN class cl ON s.class_id = cl.id WHERE ts.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND ts.type = #{type} ORDER BY ts.create_time DESC
